name: crawl-pattern
commands: ROCKY_LLM_SMOKE=1 ROCKY_BIN=./.venv/bin/rocky pytest tests/agent/test_crawl_pattern_live.py -k crawl_pattern -v -m slow
summary: Live web-crawling pattern: a research/live_compare prompt must dispatch >=3 search_web and >=2 fetch_url tool_results and cite at least one source URL. Bit-flip negative on a non-research prompt asserts zero web tool dispatch. Marked slow.
